note: The formal claims live in the manuscript and Technical Supplement. This catalog types every Paper 9 closure node; only the nine executable witnesses carry a bundled local check. Conditional, open, external, and model-certificate nodes carry no local check by design.

node_class_legend.APF_NATIVE: Proved in Paper 9 from stated definitions/assumptions (finite mathematics).
node_class_legend.CONDITIONAL_THEOREM: Conditional on an explicit gate or structural commitment.
node_class_legend.MODEL_CERTIFICATE: Exact finite model certificate; not the general theorem.
node_class_legend.EXTERNAL_ENDPOINT: Imported endpoint from another APF paper (Paper 6).
node_class_legend.EXECUTABLE_WITNESS: Bundled local check; a finite witness / falsifier control, not a symbolic proof.

entries.name: Continuation grammar (Paper 10)
entries.summary: The judgment G |-_C D->E and geometry-as-continuation-cost are imported from Paper 10 as primitive grammar.

entries.name: Linear Paper 2 specialization
entries.summary: The flat quotient branch with optimal response gains, proved as a specialization.

entries.name: Record-transition typing (Paper 14 / TS def:ts-record-transition)
entries.summary: The held-carrier / invariant-record-quotient / outcome-instrument split on a common record space; a declared structural reading, not a primitive theorem.

entries.name: Joint-realizability package
entries.summary: Finite joint extension + minimum attainment + closure invariance + positive marginal extension floor: the named package the general finite-basis theorem is conditional on.

entries.name: Exact atom-cover model certificate
entries.summary: The Engine-certified finite atom-cover instantiation of the finite-basis mechanism and one compatible minimum joint carrier: an exact model witness, not the general theorem.

entries.name: G9.1 A finite complete operational basis exists
entries.summary: General basis existence is conditional on the joint-realizability package; the exact atom-cover model is Engine-certified.

entries.name: G9.2 Basis realized as finite separating precision channels
entries.summary: Faithful operational-to-precision-channel realization: a named open gate; operational content is not yet a physical precision-channel family.

entries.name: G9.3 Record topology is Hausdorff and second countable
entries.summary: State separation gives Hausdorff; second countability needs a countable specification grammar and a topology-generating subfamily (gate).

entries.name: G9.4 Finite smooth generation -> subcartesian differential space
entries.summary: Proved under the finite smooth-generation gate.

entries.name: G9.5 Complete local continuation flows generate smooth orbits
entries.summary: On the finite-differential-presentation locus, the imported subcartesian orbit theorem gives immersed smooth continuation orbits.

entries.name: G9.6 Smooth response-factor completeness gives ker D-beta = N^ctx
entries.summary: The boxed kernel identity holds under the two-way smooth factorization gate; equal response fibres are insufficient for equal derivative kernels.

entries.name: G9.7 Intrinsic response-orbit quotient gauge and length
entries.summary: Proved intrinsically on the regular quotient (thm:canonical-operational-anchor, thm:response-orbit-length).

entries.name: G9.8 Physical anchor pulls length back to site geometry
entries.summary: Construct s and A = q . Ds, type the null kernel and provenance, prove direct-germ calibration (gate:physical-substrate-anchor).

entries.name: G9.9 Calibrated physical path cost bi-Lipschitz to response distance
entries.summary: Comparison theorem proved; ledger-rate bounds and response-class completeness remain physical inputs (thm:ledger-calibration).

entries.name: G9.10 Smooth residual energy is half squared local distance
entries.summary: Proved locally when the residual Hessian is positive definite (thm:residual-energy-distance).

entries.name: G9.11 Parallelogram quadraticity gives a positive cost metric
entries.summary: Proved from the parallelogram certificate; whether the substrate passes it is open (prop:positive-cost-metric).

entries.name: G9.12 Positive pullback geometry cannot supply Lorentzian signature
entries.summary: Positive cost is explicitly separated from Lorentzian comparison geometry (prop:positive-pullback-no-lorentz).

entries.name: G9.13 Signed Lorentz-Finsler comparison structure for the causal cone
entries.summary: Derive the causal cone, orientation, signed two-homogeneous function, and Lorentzian Hessian (gate:signed-comparison).

entries.name: G9.14 Isotropic quadratic exterior recruitment gives chi ~ 1/r
entries.summary: Proved from an assumed isotropic quadratic exterior kernel (prop:point-source-profile).

entries.name: G9.15 Calibrated clock response conditionally recovers redshift
entries.summary: Conditional recovery under load law, calibration, and the proper-time dictionary.

entries.name: G9.16 Generator trace equals comparison-volume variation
entries.summary: Proved in the represented clock-ruler comparison plane (thm:trace-volume).

entries.name: G9.17 Linear loaded equilibrium h_chi = chi K^-1 J + O(chi^2)
entries.summary: Proved under the gauge-fixed response-Hessian hypothesis (thm:no-trace-operator).

entries.name: G9.18 The no-trace gate is Ptr K^-1 J = 0
entries.summary: The decisive local theorem; source-selection or a constrained-volume theorem are the principal routes.

entries.name: G9.19 No trace gives gamma_C = 1 and the first-PN exterior
entries.summary: Follows conditionally from the no-trace gate through the trace-volume theorem (cor:ppn-volume-mode, thm:conditional-weak-field).

entries.name: G9.20 The represented nonlinear closure is Einstein gravity
entries.summary: External Paper 6 H1-H3/A9/Lovelock endpoint; the finite-continuability translation remains open.

entries.name: Sikorski differential-space structure
entries.summary: Standard Sikorski differential-space machinery (thm:ts-sikorski).

entries.name: Subcartesian / orbit theorem
entries.summary: Standard subcartesian differential-space and immersed-orbit theorems (thm:ts-subcartesian, thm:ts-orbit-import).

entries.name: Constant-rank theorem
entries.summary: Standard constant-rank / initial-topology results (thm:ts-constant-rank, thm:ts-initial-topology).

entries.name: Lovelock endpoint import
entries.summary: Standard Lovelock uniqueness feeding the Paper 6 external endpoint.

entries.name: check_T_finite_operational_basis_scope_contract
entries.summary: Names the atom-cover hypotheses; exact boundary C=1999999999/2000000000 gives N=0; a finite no-amalgamation countermodel keeps the general bridge open.

entries.name: check_T_finite_operational_basis
entries.summary: Exact-Fraction finite atom-cover model: a complete minimal operational-distinction basis exists with |B_U| <= floor(C_U/eps*); every control arm fires; no float tolerance enlarges the admitted set.

entries.name: check_T_finite_minimal_joint_realization_atom_cover
entries.summary: One compatible minimum no-excess joint carrier realizes the complete basis; independent minima with distinct joint ids are rejected.

entries.name: check_T_held_to_record_typing
entries.summary: Held carrier H, invariant record quotient R(H), and outcome instruments {C_i} are three distinct typed objects on one common ==-decided record space; distinctness follows from nonzero radical + SSB degeneracy, each shown load-bearing by a collapse control on the degenerated model.

entries.name: check_T_gammaC_carrier_fork
entries.summary: The four carrier closures solve to gamma_C in {1, 1/3, 0, -1}; gamma_GR(n)=1/(n-2) matches the plane carrier only at n=3; pooled/per-channel Cassini-dead; the weight-one curve gamma(w)=w/((n-1)-w).

entries.name: check_T_weight_one_reduction
entries.summary: Exact-rational weight-one walk: w=D(deposit)/D(commitment); exchange annihilation; the scalar mode vanishes iff w=1. Nothing here derives w=1; the citable no-source bound is gamma_C<=1 at n=3 with TCP-min/TCP-strong named [C].

entries.name: check_L_amount_graded_testedness_encoding_no_go
entries.summary: The GCC floor invariant grades representation, not magnitude: three floor-coherent signatures hold the same N-valued record at eps*{1,log2 N,N} — no amount-graded-testedness principle is a theorem of the floor invariant (magnitude-to-count transport is signature data).

entries.name: check_T_fagt2_encoding_argmin_pressure_and_read_channel
entries.summary: The (E) door walked: distributed encoding is cost-maximal on both banked axes; linear contention saves nothing; the strictly-superadditive flip gate f(M)-N f(M/N)>N-1 is pinned. (E) neither adopted nor refuted.

entries.name: check_T_contention_law_granularity_occupancy_fork
entries.summary: The contention-law walk: sharing-price consolidation (Delta discount, gate-run adverse), the granularity dichotomy (flip iff g<N under named clauses), and the occupancy fork ((c1-occ) evidence-shaped, not adopted).
